positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical graphic design featuring stylized celestial elements (crescents, stars, nebulas) woven together with lush botanical forms (stylized ferns, eucalyptus leaves, blooming peonies). The style should emulate a sophisticated, black and white woodcut etching or linocut print, characterized by strong, clean silhouettes and intricate line work. The composition must be centrally focused, suitable for an apparel print, achieving maximal contrast and visual impact. Use deep blacks and negative space for a dramatic, timeless aesthetic. The overall mood is ethereal and harmonious. Minimalist yet ornate.
negative: blur, smudge, dirty, watermark, signature, text, logo, trademark, out of frame, cropped, extra limbs, missing limbs, bad anatomy, noise, artifacts, disfigured, jpeg artifacts, low contrast, grayscale (unless desired contrast), realism, photo, cinematic
